evals.prompt: build me a course on Redis, something like a book I can actually work through with runnable examples
evals.expected_output: A scoped-out course plan (after an interview about audience/depth/language), a git repo scaffolded in the right ecosystem, live Redis infra via Docker (Redis is inherently a live service), and a rendering book/index.html + book shell using the bundled design system. Should NOT proceed to writing full chapter content in this bounded test.

evals.prompt: I want to learn React Server Components — can you make me something like a tutorial book, with chapters and code I can run myself?
evals.expected_output: A scoped-out course plan for a pure frontend/JS/TS topic, a git repo scaffolded with npm/pnpm conventions (not uv/Python), NO unnecessary Docker infra (RSC needs a Next.js dev server, not a database), and a rendering book shell. Should note StackBlitz eligibility for later. Should NOT proceed to full chapter content in this bounded test.

evals.prompt: make me a learning course for the python httpx library, book-style with examples and exercises
evals.expected_output: A scoped-out course plan for a self-contained Python library (no real external service needed — httpx can be taught against a local test server/httpbin-style mock), a git repo using uv/pytest conventions, correctly judging that full Docker Compose infra is NOT needed here (a good test of the conditional-infra logic not over-triggering), and a rendering book shell. Should NOT proceed to full chapter content in this bounded test.
